core_mechanism: symmetry-dictated universality: an emergent low-dimensional (two-dimensional) conformal symmetry algebra localized at a boundary constrains the asymptotic density of states and thus fixes the system's macroscopic/thermodynamic behavior independent of microscopic details, with the symmetry's anomaly acting as a spontaneous-symmetry-breaking source of Goldstone-like modes
brief_reason: The abstract attributes the identical ('universal') entropy obtained by inequivalent microscopic counting schemes to an underlying two-dimensional conformal symmetry near the horizon that controls the thermal properties regardless of other details, with the conformal anomaly breaking that symmetry to yield Goldstone-boson-like excitations.
